description: A style-only refinement request should produce a conducting proposal only.

input.creatorMessage: Use shorter questions, keep the tone warmer, and probe one more time before switching topics.
input.latestSampleTranscript:
assistant: What did you think of the training overall?

user: It was useful.

assistant: Why?

user: It helped.

brief.researchGoal: Understand how students apply the training

description: A missing-topic request should produce a brief patch proposal.

input.creatorMessage: We forgot mentor support. Add that as a required topic and include it in the analysis questions.
input.latestSampleTranscript:
assistant: Tell me about applying the training.

user: I struggled to keep up.

brief.researchGoal: Understand how students apply the training

description: A personality request should route to a personality overlay proposal.

input.creatorMessage: Switch this to a youth-friendly guide and make the opening lower-pressure.
input.latestSampleTranscript:
assistant: Describe your experience.

user: I am not sure where to start.

description: A request for reusable behavior should route to a playbook draft.

input.creatorMessage: Create a conducting playbook for first-year students that uses plain language and avoids academic jargon.

user: I do not know what that means.
